title: Turn-taking phrases
subtitle: Enter, continue, and hand over the conversation.
overview: B1 conversation is interaction, not monologue.
Use phrases to take and give turns.

items.en: Can I say something about this topic?

items.es: Como decía, el problema principal es el tiempo.
items.en: As I was saying, the main problem is time.

items.es: No quiero interrumpir, pero tengo una pregunta.
items.en: I do not want to interrupt, but I have a question.
What do you think about this solution?

items.es: Te toca explicar tu punto de vista.
items.en: It is your turn to explain your point of view.
